# Rabbia Psychologist Child Development Services

Owner-led parent guidance, child development resources, school support, report review support, and between-session support programs for families in Pakistan and abroad. Led by Rabbia Ashraf, Clinical Director, Clinical Psychologist licensed in Pakistan.

## Purpose
Our platform allows parents to learn from evidence-informed resources, get support planning, and book consultations.

## Services & Scope
We provide developmental guidance, ASD/ADHD support planning, behavior strategy discussion, executive-function routines, and school communication preparation internationally. Online support does not replace local medical, psychological, educational, legal, crisis, or school-based services.

## Important Pages
- Start Here: /start-here
- Parent Support: /parent-support
- Between-Session Programs: /between-session-programs
- School & IEP Help: /school-iep-help
- Report Review: /report-review

- Cases: /use-cases

- Pricing: /pricing

## Contact & Booking
- Booking: https://calendar.app.google/zMKejpnpCjh91WRG7
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rabbiapsychologist
- Emergency Disclaimer: This platform does not provide emergency care. Contact local emergency services for urgent concerns.
